title: Otto Koning - Hannover - Table Forks - 12 Piece Set Made of Stainless Steel, Shiny Polished Finish, Ideal for Everyday use.
features: Set of 12 table forks with the best value for money.
Simple lines design, ideal for daily use.
High quality 18/0 stainless steel with high gloss polished finish.
description: Product Description Made of high-quality stainless steel with a high polish finish, the Hannover dinner fork set features 12 dinner forks. The simple design of the Hannover range makes it very versatile and the high-quality stainless steel ensures that this cutlery set is practical, durable and dishwasher safe . It has a simple design and a bright polished finish . The set is excellent value and ideal for everyday use. It is a great choice for kitchen, dining table, buffet, birthday parties, meetings, travel, camping, etc. At Otto Koning we believe that cutlery is the most important table accessory and we have created a variety of ranges composed of high quality pieces to help you create unforgettable moments and bring style to your dining table. About Otto Koning: Otto Koning is professional in manufacturing stainless steel cutlery, and dedicated to providing you the best quality cutlery to meet your needs and help you to decorate your kitchen and dining table for any occasion in your life. More about Otto Koning Otto Koning is a brand with an identity that relies on the talent of its professionals to create, with high quality materials, the best cutlery to be used on all occasions. Our designers seek to combine design and functionality, knowing that the most important thing is to provide quality cutlery. QUALITY: The materials we use and the way we make them, using the best techniques, ensure the quality of our cutlery and great durability. DESIGN: Our design team analyses the latest trends in cutlery worldwide, looks for inspiration in cities around the world and mixes it with the functionality of the cutlery to create the best option for your table. SERVICE: We are committed to creating a pleasant experience through a fast purchasing process. Wash the cutlery pieces with warm soapy water before first using to wash off any processing residue left from manufacturing. 2. Dry your cutlery pieces immediately with soft cloth after washing and keep them in a dry environment. 3. Be careful with the knife blade when you clean it. 4. Try to prevent your cutlery pieces from rubbing and scratching against each other in washing and storage.
